summary.en: A concessive clause states one situation, then the main clause goes the opposite way: 'even if', 'although/though/even though', or 'no matter + wh-word'. One subordinator alone makes a complex sentence — never pair it with 'but'.
summary.zh: 让步从句先陈述一种情况，主句却做出相反的动作：用 even if、although/though/even though，或 no matter + 疑问词。一个引导词就构成复杂句——千万别再配 but。

body.en: Like a conditional clause, a concessive clause sets up a situation or assumption. But then the main clause goes the opposite way — most often 'even though X happens, I still do the opposite'. That backing-down-and-still is why it is called 'concessive'.
body.zh: 和条件从句一样，让步从句先描述某种情况或假设。但接下来主句做出一个相反或相对的动作——最常见的就是“即使发生 X，我也照样做相反的事”。这种“退一步还是怎样”就是“让步”一说的由来。

concepts.sourceRef: 都是阐述某种情况或做出某种假设，但接下来为更进一步做出一个相反或相对的阐述

heading.zh: even if —— 用假设来让步

body.en: Take a conditional clause and add 'even': now you concede the situation. Drop the 'even' and the sentence still reads fine — adding 'even' is what gives it the concessive meaning. 'Even if I see a carrot' means: granting that this happens, I will still do the opposite — not eat it.
body.zh: 把一个条件从句加上 even，就成了让步。把 even 去掉，句子照样通顺——正是加了 even 才有了让步的意思。“Even if I see a carrot”就是说：就算这种情况发生，我也会做相反的动作——不吃它。

concepts.sourceRef: 这里的even去掉，句子照样通顺，只不过加了even就有了让步的意思

heading.en: 'although / though / even though' — concession of a fact
heading.zh: although / though / even though —— 对事实让步

body.en: The conceded situation need not be a hypothesis — it can be a plain fact. 'Although I see a carrot, I will not eat it': seeing the carrot is true, yet I still back down — so what if it's a fact? I still won't eat it. 'although' can be swapped for 'though' or 'even though'.
body.zh: 让步的情况不一定是假设，也可能就是事实。“Although I see a carrot, I will not eat it”：看见胡萝卜是事实，但我还是让步——就算这是事实又怎么样呢？我还是不会吃它。引导词 although 也可以用 though 或 even though 来替代。

concepts.sourceRef: 让步的情况也不一定是假设，而可能就是事实

heading.zh: 引导词千万别再配 but

body.en: Chinese says '尽管…但是…', but English cannot say 'although … but …'. 'although' introduces a subordinate clause, and that clause plus the main clause already make a complex sentence — no extra word needed. 'but' is a coordinating conjunction that builds a compound sentence ('I see the carrot, but I will not eat it'). Using both is a cross-bred mess: is it complex or compound? So pick one.
body.zh: 中文说“尽管……但是……”，但英文不能说 although … but …。although 引导从句，从句加主句已经构成复杂句（complex sentence），不需要别的词。but 是连词，用来构成复合句（compound sentence），如“I see the carrot, but I will not eat it”。两个一起用就成了“杂交胡萝卜”——到底算复杂句还是复合句？所以只能二选一。

heading.en: 'no matter + wh-word' / 'regardless of' — concession of the unknown
heading.zh: no matter + 疑问词 / regardless of —— 对未知情况让步

body.en: The other patterns concede a specific situation; 'no matter + wh-word' concedes an unknown one — 'whatever / whoever / however the case is, I still …'. 'No matter what happens, I will not eat the carrot.' 'no matter' can be replaced by 'regardless of'.
body.zh: 前面几种让步的是某种具体情况，而 no matter + 疑问词让步的是未知情况——不管如何、什么、谁，我依旧……。“No matter what happens, I will not eat the carrot.” no matter 也可以用 regardless of 来取代。

concepts.sourceRef: 还有一个很重要的让步从句用法是no matter加一问词的形式

examples.text: Even if I see a carrot, I will not eat it.

note.en: Drop 'Even' and a plain conditional remains; 'Even' adds the concession — granting it happens, I still do the opposite.
note.zh: 去掉 Even 就剩一个普通条件句；加上 Even 才有让步——就算它发生，我也做相反的动作。

examples.text: Although I see a carrot, I will not eat it.

note.en: Seeing the carrot is a fact, not a hypothesis. 'although' = 'though' = 'even though'.
note.zh: 看见胡萝卜是事实，不是假设。although = though = even though。

examples.text: I see the carrot, but I will not eat it.

note.en: A compound sentence joined by 'but'. Correct on its own — but you must NOT also add 'although' in front.
note.zh: 用 but 连接的复合句。单独这样说没错——但绝不能再在前面加 although。

examples.text: No matter what happens, I will not eat the carrot.

annotations.quote: I will not eat the carrot

note.en: The conceded situation is unknown — whatever the case, the main clause holds.
note.zh: 让步的情况是未知的——不管怎样，主句都成立。

examples.text: No matter how hungry I am, I will not eat the carrot.

annotations.quote: I will not eat the carrot

note.en: 'No matter + wh-word' works with what / who / how alike.
note.zh: no matter + 疑问词，what / who / how 都可以。

examples.text: Regardless of what kind of video I make, you will give it a thumbs up.

annotations.quote: you will give it a thumbs up

note.en: 'regardless of' replaces 'no matter' with the same concessive sense.
note.zh: regardless of 替代 no matter，让步含义相同。

prompt.zh: 哪个句子是正确的英文？

text.en: Although I see a carrot, but I will not eat it.
text.zh: Although I see a carrot, but I will not eat it.

text.en: Although I see a carrot, I will not eat it.
text.zh: Although I see a carrot, I will not eat it.

text.en: Although I see a carrot but I will not eat it though.
text.zh: Although I see a carrot but I will not eat it though.

explain.en: 'although' already makes a complex sentence; adding 'but' double-marks it. Use one or the other, never both.
explain.zh: although 已经构成复杂句，再加 but 就重复标记了。二选一，绝不能并用。

prompt.en: Fill the blank to make it concessive (one word, the version that adds the 'even if' meaning to a conditional): ____ if I see a carrot, I will not eat it.
prompt.zh: 填空，使其成为让步（一个词，给条件句加上“即使”含义的那个词）：____ if I see a carrot, I will not eat it.

explain.en: Adding 'Even' to the conditional 'if' turns it into a concession: granting it happens, I still do the opposite.
explain.zh: 在条件 if 前加 Even 就变成让步：就算它发生，我也做相反的事。

prompt.en: Replace 'no matter' with a single phrase of the same meaning: ____ what kind of video I make, you will give it a thumbs up.
prompt.zh: 用一个意思相同的短语替换 no matter：____ what kind of video I make, you will give it a thumbs up.

explain.en: 'regardless of' is the given substitute for 'no matter' before a wh-word.
explain.zh: regardless of 是 no matter 接疑问词时的替换说法。

quizzes.sentence: Even though I am hungry, but I will not eat the carrot.
quizzes.fix: Even though I am hungry, I will not eat the carrot.

explain.en: 'even though' is a subordinator that builds a complex sentence; 'but' is a coordinator. Drop 'but'.
explain.zh: even though 是引导词，构成复杂句；but 是连词。删掉 but。

lines.speaker: Wolf
lines.text: Even if I see a carrot, I will not eat it.

lines.speaker: Rabbit
lines.text: Although I see a carrot, I will not eat it.

note.en: Concession of a fact — no 'but' allowed.
note.zh: 对事实让步——不能加 but。

lines.speaker: Wolf
lines.text: No matter who orders me, I will not eat the carrot.

annotations.quote: I will not eat the carrot
